## Copilot Instructions for AI Agents

**Note:** This project currently contains no discoverable source files, documentation, or configuration beyond the default .git directory. As such, there are no project-specific conventions, workflows, or architectural patterns to document at this time.

### Guidance for AI Agents

- If you discover new files or directories, update this document to reflect project structure, build/test workflows, and any unique conventions.
- For new code, follow standard best practices for the language and framework in use.
